ui.codexNoProfiles: No saved account yet — choose Re-authenticate to sign in once.
ui.codexSwitchTitle: Close the running Codex CLI and reopen it with the selected account
ui.codexReauthTitle: Open codex login to add or update an account
ui.codexDeleteTitle: Delete the selected local account backup
ui.codexSwitchConfirm: Switch to {account}? The running Codex CLI will close and the current account will be saved first. ChatGPT will stay open.
ui.codexReauthConfirm: Re-authenticate Codex? The running Codex CLI will close and the current account will be saved first. ChatGPT will stay open.
ui.codexReauthSuccess: codex login is open. Complete sign-in in the new window.
ui.codexDeleteConfirm: Delete the local account backup for {account}? The account currently signed in to Codex will not be signed out.
ui.agyCliOpenTitle: Open the CLI with AGY's currently native signed-in account
ui.agyCliOpenConfirm: Open AGY CLI? It uses AGY's currently native signed-in account; VibeDeck quota accounts will not change it.
ui.agyCliOpenSuccess: AGY CLI opened with its native signed-in account.
ui.agyAddQuotaAccountTitle: Sign in so VibeDeck can read AGY quota; this does not change the active AGY CLI account
ui.agyOauthOpened: The AGY quota sign-in page opened on the PC.

updates.confirm: Download and install v{version}? VibeDeck will close briefly; paired devices and layouts will be kept.
updates.installerStarted: Setup is open. Approve Windows if asked; VibeDeck will restart when it finishes.
updates.notPublished: No public release has been published yet.
updates.installedOnly: Update checks are available in installed VibeDeck.
updates.failed: Unable to prepare the update. Try again later.

deviceLab.title: Device layout lab
deviceLab.subtitle: Load the real product UI at calibrated CSS viewports to catch layout overflow quickly.
deviceLab.loading: Waiting for the page to load.
deviceLab.exact: Viewport {actual}; matches {expected} with no horizontal overflow.
deviceLab.overflow: Viewport {actual}; content width is {content}px and overflows horizontally.
deviceLab.booxSource: BOOX: PWA viewport measured with ADB + Chrome DevTools

secureEndpoint.title: VibeDeck secure URL
secureEndpoint.localScanHint: Use the phone camera to scan the QR code on the left and open this PC's HTTPS page.
secureEndpoint.localWarningHint: If the browser says the page is dangerous or the connection is not private, tap Advanced and Continue.
secureEndpoint.statusPending: Not enabled yet. After creating the Cloudflare Tunnel, enter {url}.
secureEndpoint.statusEnabled: Trusted HTTPS is enabled; scanning the QR code will not show a browser warning.
secureEndpoint.manualHint: Used only while setting up the first Tunnel. A future VibeDeck release will provision it automatically.
secureEndpoint.connectHint: This VibeDeck secure URL is ready. Scan and pair directly; no browser warning or certificate installation is needed.
secureEndpoint.scanHint: Scan the QR code on the left to open the secure page directly.
secureEndpoint.pairHint: Tap Connect to this PC on the phone, then verify the code on the PC.
secureEndpoint.qrScan: Scan with the phone to open the secure page, then tap Connect to this PC.
secureEndpoint.pairPrompt: Scan the QR code with the phone, tap Connect to this PC, then verify the code on the PC.
secureEndpoint.iosPair: The secure URL is ready. Pair from the PC, then add this page to the Home Screen.
secureEndpoint.saved: Secure URL saved. Scan the QR code again to use trusted HTTPS.
secureEndpoint.cleared: Secure URL disabled. The QR code now uses the local connection.
secureEndpoint.saveFailed: Unable to save the secure URL.
secureEndpoint.clearFailed: Unable to disable the secure URL.
secureEndpoint.einkTitle: No camera on the e-paper device?
secureEndpoint.einkHintAfter: in the e-paper browser, then enter the one-time connection code below.
secureEndpoint.einkIdle: The code is valid for 10 minutes and expires after one use.
secureEndpoint.einkReady: Code ready. Use it once before {expiresAt}.
secureEndpoint.einkFailed: Unable to create a connection code. Check that the secure URL and Cloudflare Tunnel are online.

auth.password_not_configured: Remote password sign-in is not enabled.
auth.rate_limited: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again later.

quota.codex_profile_not_found: The selected Codex account backup was not found.
quota.codex_write_failed: Unable to update Codex sign-in data.
quota.codex_launch_failed: The account was switched, but Codex could not be reopened.

public_endpoint.invalid_url: Enter a complete HTTPS secure URL.
public_endpoint.https_required: The secure URL must use HTTPS.
public_endpoint.invalid_shape: The secure URL cannot contain an account, port, path, query, or fragment.
public_endpoint.unexpected_host: The secure URL must exactly match the URL shown for this PC.
public_endpoint.persistence_failed: The secure URL could not be saved. Check the VibeDeck data-folder permissions and try again.

display.ready: Windows will ask for administrator approval after you create it.
display.installing: Downloading and creating the virtual display. This usually takes about a minute.
display.finishing: The driver is installed; waiting for Windows to show the extended desktop.
display.restart_required: Restart Windows to finish installing the virtual display.
display.repair_ready: The driver is installed, but Windows has not shown the virtual display. Repair will complete the setup and restart the driver.
display.console_required: The virtual display is installed, but VibeDeck is running in a Remote Desktop session. Restart VibeDeck from this PC's local Windows desktop.

patterns.已找到 Host，請在 PC 按允許（驗證碼 {code}）。: Host found. Click Allow on the PC (code {code}).
patterns.{label} 回了 HTML 而不是 JSON（多半是離線頁或連不到 Host: {label} returned HTML instead of JSON (usually the offline page or an unreachable Host). Confirm the PC Host is running and use https://<PC-IP>:5443 on iPhone.

legacy.第一次使用或要加入另一台手機時開啟: Open for first-time setup or to add another phone
legacy.最近操作與錯誤會保留 30 天: Recent actions and errors are kept for 30 days
legacy.每次重要操作都會記錄追蹤碼。遇到問題時複製摘要即可快速定位。: Every important action records a trace ID. Copy the summary when something goes wrong to locate the issue quickly.
legacy.診斷紀錄寫入失敗: Diagnostic log could not be written
legacy.尚無可顯示的診斷軌跡。: No diagnostic trail to display yet.
legacy.這個 Host 正在另一個網路。請輸入 Host 設定的遠端密碼。: This Host is on another network. Enter the remote password configured for the Host.
legacy.遠端登入只接受 HTTPS。若還沒設定，請在 Host 啟動前設定 VIBEDE: Remote sign-in requires HTTPS. Set VIBEDECK_REMOTE_PASSWORD or PHONEMONITOR_REMOTE_PASSWORD before starting the Host.
legacy.長亮、主畫面 App、穩定連線都需要 HTTPS。這台 iPhone 不要再用: HTTPS is required for wake lock, the Home Screen app, and a stable connection. Do not open VibeDeck over HTTP on this iPhone.
legacy.設定 → 一般 → 關於本機 → 憑證信任設定 → 開啟完整信任: Settings → General → About → Certificate Trust Settings → enable full trust
legacy.Android 瀏覽器可用 HTTP 測試；iPhone 固定走 HTTPS，不: Android browsers can use HTTP for testing; iPhone always uses HTTPS.
legacy.若主畫面還是舊圖示／舊名稱：長按刪除舊圖示，改從 HTTPS 頁重新「加入主畫面: If the Home Screen still shows the old icon or name, delete it and add the HTTPS page again.
legacy.手機副螢幕與資訊板 Host: Phone second display and sideboard Host
legacy.安裝完成後 Host 會自動重新偵測顯示器，不需要離開此頁。: The Host will detect the display again after installation; you can stay on this page.
legacy.用手機相機掃描網址，或按下配對後掃描一次性配對 QR。: Scan the URL with your phone camera, or start pairing and scan the one-time pairing QR code.
legacy.用手機瀏覽器開啟 HTTPS 網址；第一次只需在下方允許一次。: Open the HTTPS URL in your phone browser; approve it once below.
legacy.iPhone 或需要長亮時，先下載並信任本機 HTTPS 憑證。: For iPhone or wake lock, download and trust the local HTTPS certificate first.
legacy.手機掃描 QR Code，開啟 HTTPS Host。: Scan the QR code on your phone to open the HTTPS Host.
legacy.手機按配對申請，PC 按允許或拒絕。: Tap Pair on the phone; click Allow or Deny on the PC.
legacy.HTTPS 與 QR Code 已準備: HTTPS and QR code are ready
legacy.長亮、主畫面 App 與穩定串流需要 HTTPS。第一次開啟會看到瀏覽器警告，不: Keep-awake, Home Screen mode, and stable streaming require HTTPS. The browser shows a warning the first time; no certificate installation is required.
legacy.若 Safari 顯示警告，按「顯示詳細資訊」或「進階」: If Safari shows a warning, tap Show Details or Advanced
legacy.選擇「造訪此網站」或「繼續前往」，再回 VibeDeck 配對: Choose Visit This Website or Continue, then return to VibeDeck to pair
legacy.這是 KENBRAIN 在本機網路使用自簽憑證的正常提示，只需接受一次。: This is the normal prompt for KENBRAIN's self-signed certificate on your local network. Accept it once.
legacy.iPhone：開啟 HTTPS → 首次警告按進階繼續 → 配對 → 分享加入主: iPhone: open HTTPS, continue past the first warning, pair, then add to the Home Screen.
legacy.不必安裝憑證。第一次開啟時，在瀏覽器警告頁按「進階」→「繼續前往」。: No certificate installation is required. On first open, tap Advanced and Continue on the browser warning page.
legacy.用相機掃描左側 QR Code，開啟 KENBRAIN 的 HTTPS 頁面。: Scan the QR code on the left to open KENBRAIN's HTTPS page.
legacy.若顯示「危險網頁」或「連線不是私人連線」，按「進階」→「繼續前往」。: If the browser says the page is dangerous or the connection is not private, tap Advanced and Continue.
legacy.手機按「連接這台電腦」，再回 PC 核對驗證碼並按「允許」。: Tap Connect to this PC on the phone, then verify the code on the PC and select Allow.
legacy.只有進階使用者需要：Android / BOOX 下載後請選「CA 憑證」；一般: Advanced users only: on Android or BOOX, choose CA certificate after downloading. Most users can simply tap Advanced and Continue on the warning page.
legacy.你已經開啟正確頁面。按下方按鈕，再回 PC 核對六位數驗證碼並按「允許」。: You opened the correct page. Tap the button below, then verify the six-digit code on the PC and select Allow.
legacy.手機已配對，可以直接使用 VibeDeck。: The phone is paired and ready to use VibeDeck.
legacy.手機申請已送達；請核對驗證碼並按「允許」。: The phone request arrived. Verify the code and select Allow.
legacy.手機掃碼；若出現瀏覽器警告，按「進階」→「繼續前往」。: Scan with the phone. If a browser warning appears, tap Advanced and Continue.
legacy.請按「連接這台電腦」，再回 PC 按允許。: Tap Connect to this PC, then return to the PC and select Allow.
legacy.申請已送出；請回 PC 核對驗證碼並按允許：: Request sent. Verify this code on the PC and select Allow:
legacy.手機申請已送達，等待 PC 核准: Phone request received; waiting for PC approval
legacy.請用手機掃描 QR Code；若出現警告，按「進階」→「繼續前往」，再於手機按「: Scan the QR code with your phone. If a warning appears, tap Advanced and Continue, then tap Connect to this PC.
legacy.頁面已開啟，可以開始連接: Page opened. You can connect now.
legacy.若瀏覽器顯示警告，按「顯示詳細資訊」或「進階」: If the browser shows a warning, tap Show Details or Advanced.
legacy.這是本機電腦使用自簽憑證的正常提示，只需接受一次。: This is the normal prompt for a self-signed certificate from your local computer. Accept it once.
legacy.用相機掃描左側 QR Code，開啟這台電腦的 HTTPS 頁面。: Scan the QR code on the left to open this computer's HTTPS page.
legacy.Android / BOOX 安裝 CA 憑證: Install CA certificate on Android / BOOX
legacy.Android / BOOX：下載後請在系統憑證安裝器選「CA 憑證」，不是 V: Android / BOOX: after downloading, choose CA certificate in the system installer, not VPN and app certificate; then fully close and reopen Chrome.
legacy.按下開始配對，再到 PC 視窗核對六位數驗證碼並按「允許」。: Start pairing, then verify the six-digit code in the PC window and click Allow.
legacy.資訊板與 AI 額度不需要虛擬螢幕，可以直接使用。: Sideboard and AI quota work without a virtual display.
legacy.拖曳卡片調整位置；寬、高每次調整一格。: Drag cards to move them; adjust width and height one step at a time.
legacy.點選卡片；可直接拖曳卡片，或用上方控制列調整大小。: Select a card, then drag it directly or use the top controls to resize it.
legacy.手機版只調整顯示、隱藏與順序；桌面及電子書版面不受影響。: The phone view controls visibility and order only; desktop and e-paper layouts are unchanged.
legacy.先建立一張卡片，再串接外部資料。: Create a card first, then connect an external data source.
legacy.把這台 PC 的新通知轉成「Windows 通知」訊息卡片。: Turn new notifications from this PC into Windows notification message cards.
legacy.控制保留筆數與通知進場動畫，設定會保存到 Host。: Control retained items and notification animation; settings are saved to the Host.
legacy.只有 Host PC 本機可以建立或修改來源。: Sources can only be created or changed on the Host PC.
legacy.Token 只會顯示這一次；關閉後 VibeDeck 不會再提供舊 Token。: The token is shown once; VibeDeck cannot show it again after closing.
legacy.刪除這個 Codex Profile 額度快取: Delete this Codex profile quota cache
legacy.切換成電子紙版面（BOOX / 電子書）。也可在網址加 ?eink=1。: Switch to the e-paper layout (BOOX / e-reader). You can also add ?eink=1 to the URL.
legacy.目前是電子紙版面（資訊板優先、高對比）。再按可切回一般手機版。: E-paper layout is active (sideboard first, high contrast). Click again to return to the standard phone layout.
legacy.單指操作 PC 滑鼠 · 連點兩下放大畫面: One-finger PC mouse control · double-tap to enlarge
legacy.VibeDeck 手機端已就緒，但 PC Host 沒有回應。: VibeDeck on the phone is ready, but the PC Host is not responding.
legacy.• Host 沒開（它需要你在電腦按 start.bat）: • The Host is not running (start it from your PC)
legacy.• WiFi 斷了（我只是一支手機，我不會通靈）: • Wi-Fi is disconnected (this phone cannot read minds)
legacy.• 電腦睡著了（跟你一樣懶）: • The PC is asleep (just like you might be)
legacy.WebRTC 無法連線，切回 JPEG：: WebRTC could not connect; switching to JPEG:
legacy.WebRTC 中斷（ICE disconnected），切回 JPEG: WebRTC disconnected (ICE disconnected); switching to JPEG
legacy.WebRTC ICE failed，切回 JPEG: WebRTC ICE failed; switching to JPEG
legacy.請確認 Host 仍在執行，或先改用資訊板。: Make sure the Host is running, or use the sideboard.
legacy.AGY 登入頁已在 PC 開啟。: AGY sign-in opened on the PC.
legacy.已重新讀取，來源沒有新額度資料。: Reloaded; the source has no new quota data.
legacy.請先登入 Host。: Sign in to the Host first.
legacy.主畫面模式。用副螢幕時點: Home Screen mode. When using the second display, tap
legacy.請先配對手機，才能查看 AI 額度。: Pair your phone with the PC before viewing local AI quota.
legacy.App：瀏覽器可安裝（用瀏覽器選單）。: App: install from the browser menu.
legacy.App：可用瀏覽器選單加入主畫面。: App: use the browser menu to add to Home Screen.
legacy.長亮：點按鈕開啟: Keep awake: tap the button to enable
legacy.直式適合看資訊板 / 額度；副螢幕建議橫向全螢幕。: Portrait is ideal for the sideboard / quota; use landscape fullscreen for the second display.
legacy.VibeDeck 無法讀取本機電腦資訊。: VibeDeck cannot read local computer information.
legacy.所有可用卡片都已在版面上。: All available cards are already on the layout.
legacy.目前卡片尺寸無法重新排列；請先縮小一張卡片。: The current card sizes cannot be rearranged. Shrink a card first.
legacy.這個尺寸放不下；請先隱藏或移動相鄰卡片。: That size will not fit. Hide or move an adjacent card first.
legacy.手機先掃描 QR Code 開啟 HTTPS Host，再按「配對申請」。: First scan the QR code on your phone to open the HTTPS Host, then tap “Request pairing”.
legacy.iPhone：先裝 HTTPS 憑證 → 用 HTTPS 配對 → 分享加入主畫: iPhone: install the HTTPS certificate → pair over HTTPS → add from Share to the Home Screen → tap “Keep awake ON”.
legacy.串流：無法讀取能力狀態。: Stream: unable to read capability status.
legacy.只接受 5～30 則；儲存後超出的舊通知會被清掉。: Only 5–30 items are allowed; older notifications beyond the limit are removed after saving.
legacy.目前單屏已滿，請先隱藏或縮小其他卡片。: This screen is full. Hide or shrink another card first.
legacy.恢復這個裝置方向的預設版面？: Restore the default layout for this device orientation?
legacy.版面已經沒有可向上收合的空白。: There are no more gaps to compact.
legacy.Windows 通知狀態讀取失敗。: Failed to read Windows notification status.
legacy.Companion 會在登入使用者的 Windows 工作階段取得通知權限。: The Companion gets notification access in the signed-in Windows session.
legacy.目前 Host 是非封裝模式，請使用含通知權限的 MSIX 版本。: This Host is unpackaged; use the MSIX build with notification access.
legacy.自訂卡片已鎖定，請先配對手機。: Custom cards are locked. Pair a phone first.
legacy.立即撤銷舊 Token 並產生新 Token: Revoke the old token and create a new one now
legacy.的 Token？舊 Token 會立即失效。: 's token? The old token will stop working.
legacy.這會清除目前卡片資料。: This clears the current card data.
legacy.資料來源管理讀取失敗: Failed to load data source management
legacy.新通知會由完整資料即時推送，再在畫面上逐字出現。: New notifications are pushed in full, then streamed on screen.
legacy.逐字串流目前只套用在即時訊息卡片。: Typewriter streaming only applies to message-feed cards.
legacy.請使用 Ctrl+C 複製連線資訊: Use Ctrl+C to copy the connection info
legacy.iPhone 必須用 <strong>HTTPS</strong>。第一次警告請: iPhone requires HTTPS. On the first warning, choose Advanced and continue.
legacy.HTTPS 就緒。回 PC 配對並掃 QR，成功後同一頁加入主畫面。: HTTPS is ready. Return to the PC, pair by QR, then add this same page to the Home Screen.
legacy.已配對。分享 → <strong>加入主畫面</strong>，打開後點 <st: Paired. Tap Share → Add to Home Screen, then turn Keep awake ON after opening it.
legacy.iPhone HTTPS。可分享 → 加入主畫面。: iPhone HTTPS. Use Share → Add to Home Screen.
legacy.Host 已連線，等待你開始配對: Host connected. Waiting for you to start pairing.
legacy.無法提出配對申請。: Unable to submit the pairing request.
legacy.配對 token 已取得，正在重新載入驗證。: Pairing token received. Reloading to verify it.
legacy.PC 已拒絕這次配對。: The PC denied this pairing request.
legacy.配對申請已逾時，重新整理可再試。: The pairing request timed out. Refresh to try again.
legacy.要清空所有已配對裝置嗎？目前裝置會需要重新配對。: Clear all paired devices? Current devices will need to pair again.
legacy.按 Safari 底部分享 →: In Safari, tap Share at the bottom →
legacy.。不要另開新分頁再加。: . Do not open another tab before adding it.
legacy.信任狀態暫時無法取得，沿用上次狀態。: Trust status is temporarily unavailable; using the previous state.
legacy.資訊板已開到副螢幕。: Sideboard opened on the second display.
legacy.無法把資訊板開到副螢幕。: Failed to open Sideboard on the second display.
legacy.session 沒有 action token。: The session has no action token.
legacy.手機需先與 PC 完成配對，才能查看本機 AI 額度。: Pair the phone with the PC before viewing local AI quota.
legacy.請確認 Host 在跑，並在 PC 本機操作額度來源。: Make sure the Host is running, and manage quota sources locally on the PC.
legacy.切換上方分頁查看 AGY / Codex 的導入說明。: Use the tabs above for AGY / Codex setup instructions.
legacy.串流：iPhone WebRTC H.264 可用，JPEG fallback: Streaming: iPhone WebRTC H.264 is available; JPEG fallback is retained.
legacy.串流：JPEG 可用，瀏覽器 H.264 可用。: Streaming: JPEG and browser H.264 are available.
legacy.串流：JPEG 可用；H.264 Host 編碼器尚未接上。: Streaming: JPEG is available; the Host H.264 encoder is not connected.
legacy.App：Safari 分享 → 加入主畫面（不要用網頁假按鈕）。: App: Safari Share → Add to Home Screen (do not use a fake web button).
legacy.App：先改 HTTPS，再分享 → 加入主畫面。: App: switch to HTTPS, then Share → Add to Home Screen.
legacy.請先配對手機，才能觀看虛擬螢幕。: Pair a phone before viewing the virtual display.
legacy.完成配對後才能觀看虛擬螢幕。資訊板可直接使用。: Pairing is required to view the virtual display. Sideboard remains available.
legacy.無法取得 VibeDeck 顯示器狀態。: Unable to get VibeDeck display status.
legacy.尚未建立 VibeDeck 虛擬螢幕。: The VibeDeck virtual display has not been created.
legacy.這台電腦還沒有虛擬螢幕: This PC has no virtual display yet
legacy.建立後，Windows 才能把手機當成真正的延伸桌面。: After it is created, Windows can use the phone as a real extended desktop.
legacy.請到這台 PC 的 VibeDeck 頁面建立虛擬螢幕；手機不能遠端觸發管理員安: Create the virtual display on this PC's VibeDeck page; phones cannot trigger administrator installation remotely.
legacy.請在 Windows 管理員確認視窗按「是」，完成前不要關閉 VibeDeck。: Click Yes in the Windows administrator confirmation and keep VibeDeck open until it finishes.
legacy.驅動已安裝，正在等待 Windows 顯示新的延伸桌面。: The driver is installed; waiting for Windows to expose the new extended desktop.
legacy.Windows 必須重新開機才能完成虛擬螢幕安裝。: Windows must restart to finish virtual display installation.
legacy.請在本機 Windows 桌面啟動: Start it on the local Windows desktop
legacy.遠端桌面會把實體與虛擬顯示器換成 RDP 畫面，因此 VibeDeck 無法在這: Remote Desktop replaces physical and virtual displays with the RDP screen, so VibeDeck cannot receive the extended desktop in this session.
legacy.虛擬螢幕沒有建立成功: The virtual display was not created
legacy.可以再試一次；原本的螢幕與資訊板不受影響。: Try again; existing displays and Sideboard are unaffected.
legacy.請在這台 PC 跳出的管理員確認視窗按「是」。: Click Yes in the administrator confirmation on this PC.
legacy.無法取得虛擬螢幕狀態。: Unable to get virtual display status.
legacy.iPhone 副螢幕比例套用失敗: Failed to apply the iPhone second-display aspect ratio
legacy.主畫面模式。用副螢幕時點 <strong>長亮 ON</strong>。: Home Screen mode. When using the second display, turn Keep awake ON.
